summary: Russian operators from the "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 105 Ukrainian targets on April 16, 2026, including personnel and fixed-wing UAVs, across the Donbas, Sumy, and Belgorod directions, with 107 targets destroyed the previous day in Donbas, Belgorod, and Krasny Liman. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to kill two Russian soldiers on motorcycles during an assault and later neutralized a Russian soldier who attempted to feign surrender and flee. Ukrainian electronic warfare successfully jammed an FPV drone, forcing it to land, while soldiers from the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV attack near Kostiantynivka after detecting the drone with a detector.
